button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://example.org/CodeSystem/SampleStatusCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="LAB_NOT_CONFIRMED"><display value="Not confirmed (all tests negative)"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://example.org/CodeSystem/SampleStatusCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="LAB_PENDING"><display value="Pending (results missing / not yet available)"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://example.org/CodeSystem/SampleStatusCS"><version value="0.1.0"><code value="LAB_INCONCLUSIVE"><display value="Inconclusive (indeterminate/invalid without any positive)"></coding>
